description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the nixos/nix Docker image and define the NPM_STORE_PREFIX variable pointing to .npm-store. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs before_script commands `nix-shell --run "direnv allow"` and `nix-shell --run "ci/build.sh"`, then executes `nix-shell --run "ci/test.sh"` and `nix-shell --run "pnpx codecov"`; cache the .npm-store/ directory with key cache-all and skip the job when the commit message matches /skip-test/. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs before_script `nix-shell --run "direnv allow"` and script `nix-shell --run "ci/pages.sh"`; cache .npm-store/ with key cache-prod, publish the public/ directory as an artifact, and run only on the release and master branches. Ensure artifacts and caches are correctly configured as described.
